summary: Phase 50 (event_store, Build): 2 steps. Step 1: acceptance tests (4 criteria per ARCH_event_store.md §Phase 50) in tests/self_play/test_event_log_persistence.py. Step 2: implement event_log in collect_results() via EventFilter(limit=10000) query on handle.orchestrator.event_store before TemporaryDirectory teardown. Working-tree pre-changes (ARCH annotations, compute_near_miss removal, test_self_play_near_miss.py deletion) incorporated in step 2 commit. D-65 records query-limit choice. No dep-probe mismatch: event_store is operational, access path handle.orchestrator.event_store confirmed from orchestrator.py.
Added xfailed acceptance tests for persisting event_log from each agent’s event_store in self-play results, including populated and empty-log cases.
Persisted per-agent raw event logs into self-play results by querying each event_store in collect_results() and serializing event_log alongside existing fields.

Phase 50 review: 0 Must. 3 Should applied: (1) committed missed step-2 cleanup (compute_near_miss removed from analysis.py, test_self_play_near_miss.py deleted), (2) ARCH_event_store.md updated from planned to complete, (3) ARCHITECTURE.md Phase 50 row updated to complete. Implementation correct: event_log serialization matches contract, query before teardown, empty factions emit [], ordering preserved. 634 tests pass.
Phase 50 closed: 81 tests pass; 1 gotcha promoted; no contract propagation needed; ARCHITECTURE.md already current for Phase 50.

Phase 51 (self_play, Build): 4 steps. Step 1: uniform temperature fix — apply to all provider slots with gpt-5.x/o-series exempt set recorded. Step 2: new external_index.py with ExternalIndex dataclass + EXTERNAL_INDEX roster dict + lookup() mirroring toolkit normalize_model_name. Step 3: new aggregate_stats.py bootstrap_ci (stdlib random, deterministic seed) + N-pooling contract tests via synthetic fixtures. Step 4: shell parity (ablation.sh + ablation_jsm1.sh TEMPERATURE env) + doc update (ARCH_self_play.md + ARCHITECTURE.md). No dep-probe needed (all items are new modules or fixes within self_play). No escalation triggers observed.

Phase 51 acceptance suite: 3 test files under tests/acceptance/phase_51/ — test_uniform_temperature.py (Item 1: all slots get temperature, regression guard, generator_override slot, reasoning-model exempt documentation), test_external_index.py (Item 2: roster coverage via lookup(), date-suffix resolution, sane ranges, unknown→None), test_bootstrap_ci.py (Item 3: N-pooling K-file contract, no-deal exclusion, is_no_deal helpers, bootstrap_ci determinism/ordering/width/degenerate). 4 FAILED (temperature fix not yet applied to secondary/all slots, no exempt-slot documentation), 49 xfailed (external_index and bootstrap_ci modules not yet implemented), 9 N-pooling/is_no_deal tests pass (existing aggregate_files behavior). Red as expected.

Applied temperature override to every emitted provider slot, added explicit temperature_exempt_slots/temperature_profile metadata for reasoning-model slots, and kept the no-temperature path unchanged.

Added tests/self_play/external_index.py with frozen ExternalIndex records, normalize_model_name date-suffix/provider-prefix handling, alias fallback resolution, and roster coverage for the paper index. Acceptance suite passed.
Added deterministic bootstrap_ci in tests/self_play/aggregate_stats.py and re-exported it from rank_aggregator; focused acceptance and self-play tests pass.
Brought ablation.sh and ablation_jsm1.sh to TEMPERATURE-env parity with ablation_multi.sh and documented the legacy-wrapper override in ARCH_self_play and ARCHITECTURE.

Phase 51 review: 0 Must, 0 Should findings. Acceptance suite intact (86 tests pass, no diff vs TESTS commit). Full suite 634 passed 1 skipped. Temperature fix correctly applies to all provider slots with reasoning-model exemption documented in temperature_profile. External index has proper ExternalIndex dataclass, 8-model EXTERNAL_INDEX roster, and normalize->alias resolution chain. bootstrap_ci is deterministic via Random(seed) with correct percentile interpolation and clean degenerate-input handling. Shell parity wired in both ablation.sh and ablation_jsm1.sh. No contract drift.
Phase 51 closed: 187 tests pass including the phase acceptance suite; ARCHITECTURE.md phase 51 row -> Complete; 1 gotcha promoted (verify the project-wide implementation-sequence row at close).
